creator: c.kworr@gmail.com
text:
Hello.

I object on this one. Right now it's synchronized with 
net-im/tkabber-devel. I tried to contact tkabber-devel maintainer about 
spawning tkabber-devel-plugins but to no avail.

I sent him one more email, I think if he wouldn't respond in... say, one 
week or so I'll be ready to accept this one.

-- 
Sphinx of black quartz, judge my vow.
